Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants an analysis of an event log representing a loan application process The analysis must be divided into three parts identifying normative rule violations strict rules identifying desiderata failures recommended but not strict rules and suggesting interpretations justifications for the observed behaviors

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Specific Ordering Rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If Rejected Do not finalize documentation before closing Prohibitions Skipping steps changing order finalizing after rejection closing without following decision logic Part 2 Desiderata Recommended Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call anytime before Close Case encouraged not required

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event Log Case 1 App Rec Credit Check Risk Assess Decision Approved Inform Finalize Doc Close Case Case 2 App Rec Risk Assess Credit Check Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Case 3 App Rec Credit Check Risk Assess Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case No Follow up Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task 1 Identify Normative Rule Violations Strict Rules Case 1 Check sequence App Credit Check Risk Decision Approved Inform Finalize Close All rules followed No violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Check sequence App Risk Assessment Wait Credit Check is after Risk Assessment Violation Credit Check Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Wait Finalize is after Rejection Violation Close Case Violations 1 Risk Assessment before Credit Check 2 Finalizing Documentation after a Rejection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Check sequence App Credit Check Risk Decision Approved Inform Finalize Close All strict rules followed No normative violations

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Case 2 Credit check within 24h Yes Inform within 48h No Inform step is completely missing which is actually a normative violation too but lets check the log Wait the log for Case 2 App Risk Credit Decision Finalize Close Inform Applicant is missing entirely Missing a mandatory step is a normative violation I must add this to Task 1 Lets re verify Case 2 normative Missing Inform Applicant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task 2 Identify Desiderata Failures Recommended Case 1 Credit check within 24h Yes 30 mins Inform within 48h Yes 2 hours Follow up call No Minor desideratum failure but acceptable

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Credit check within 24h No Jan 12 0900 to Jan 14 1000 is more than 48 hours Inform within 48h No Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500 is more than 48 hours Follow up call No Desiderata failures Credit check delay Inform delay missing follow up call

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Textbook execution Highly efficient The lack of a follow up call might just mean the process was so smooth the applicant did not need one or it is an optional step that was deprioritized due to the efficiency of the main flow

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 2 Severe process breakdown Why did Risk Assessment happen before Credit Check Maybe an automated system triggered a preliminary risk flag based on incomplete data or a human error occurred Why was documentation finalized after rejection Perhaps the system auto generates a rejection letter and mistakenly tagged it as Finalize Documentation or the employee misunderstood the protocol and thought finalizing meant closing the file with a rejection letter The missing Inform Applicant step is critical perhaps Finalize Documentation was mistakenly used instead of informing the applicant but the system logged it under the wrong activity name

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Suboptimal but compliant Why the delays The applicant might have been difficult to reach missing documents could have caused a backlog or it was a weekend holiday period Weekend delay explains the more than 24h credit check and more than 48h inform The lack of a follow up call is normal for approved cases that proceed smoothly to documentation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review against User Prompt Identified normative violations Yes Case 2 Order swap finalize after reject missing inform Identified desiderata failures Yes Case 1 missing follow up Case 3 timing delays missing follow up Clarified they are suboptimal but not severe Yes Suggested interpretations justifications Yes provided logical business reasons for the anomalies
